title: BLOCK 2 FINAL: First short story
text: a cat sat on the mat. the dog came in. the cat ran fast. the dog ran too. they played in the yard. mom called them home. the end.

tips.text: Period at the end of each sentence

tips.target: a cat sat on the mat. the dog came in. the cat ran fast.

tips.text: You're a real little writer now!

tips.target: the dog ran too. they played in the yard. mom called them home. the end.

character_tips.anna: 🎯 First story! 25 WPM = great young typist.
character_tips.knopych: 🐉 BLOCK 2 BOSS DEFEATED! Real story written!
character_tips.klavochka: 🎉 First story, my hero! 💖 So proud!
